# `ggstats`: extension to `ggplot2` for plotting stats

The `ggstats` package provides new statistics, new geometries and new
positions for `ggplot2` and a suite of functions to facilitate the
creation of statistical plots.

## Installation & Documentation

To install **stable version**:

``` r
install.packages("ggstats")
```

Documentation of stable version: <https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/>

To install **development version**:

``` r
remotes::install_github("larmarange/ggstats")
```

Documentation of development version:
<https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/>

## Plot model coefficients

``` r
library(ggstats)

mod1 <- lm(Fertility ~ ., data = swiss)
ggcoef_model(mod1)
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-4-1.png)

``` r
ggcoef_table(mod1)
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-4-2.png)

## Comparing several models

``` r
mod2 <- step(mod1, trace = 0)
mod3 <- lm(Fertility ~ Agriculture + Education * Catholic, data = swiss)
models <- list(
  "Full model" = mod1,
  "Simplified model" = mod2,
  "With interaction" = mod3
)

ggcoef_compare(models, type = "faceted")
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-5-1.png)

## Compute custom proportions

``` r
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(as.data.frame(Titanic)) +
  aes(x = Class, fill = Survived, weight = Freq, by = Class) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  geom_text(stat = "prop", position = position_fill(.5)) +
  facet_grid(~Sex)
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-6-1.png)

## Compute weighted mean

``` r
data(tips, package = "reshape")
ggplot(tips) +
  aes(x = day, y = total_bill, fill = sex) +
  stat_weighted_mean(geom = "bar", position = "dodge") +
  ylab("Mean total bill per day and sex")
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-7-1.png)

## Compute cross-tabulation statistics

``` r
ggplot(as.data.frame(Titanic)) +
  aes(
    x = Class, y = Survived, weight = Freq,
    size = after_stat(observed), fill = after_stat(std.resid)
  ) +
  stat_cross(shape = 22) +
  scale_fill_steps2(breaks = c(-3, -2, 2, 3), show.limits = TRUE) +
  scale_size_area(max_size = 20)
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-8-1.png)

## Plot survey objects taking into account weights

``` r
library(survey, quietly = TRUE)
#> 
#> Attachement du package : 'survey'
#> L'objet suivant est masqué depuis 'package:graphics':
#> 
#>     dotchart
dw <- svydesign(
  ids = ~1,
  weights = ~Freq,
  data = as.data.frame(Titanic)
)
ggsurvey(dw) +
  aes(x = Class, fill = Survived) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  ylab("Weighted proportion of survivors")
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-9-1.png)

## Plot Likert-type items

``` r
library(dplyr)
#> 
#> Attachement du package : 'dplyr'
#> Les objets suivants sont masqués depuis 'package:stats':
#> 
#>     filter, lag
#> Les objets suivants sont masqués depuis 'package:base':
#> 
#>     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
likert_levels <- c(
  "Strongly disagree",
  "Disagree",
  "Neither agree nor disagree",
  "Agree",
  "Strongly agree"
)
set.seed(42)
df <-
  tibble(
    q1 = sample(likert_levels, 150, replace = TRUE),
    q2 = sample(likert_levels, 150, replace = TRUE, prob = 5:1),
    q3 = sample(likert_levels, 150, replace = TRUE, prob = 1:5),
    q4 = sample(likert_levels, 150, replace = TRUE, prob = 1:5),
    q5 = sample(c(likert_levels, NA), 150, replace = TRUE),
    q6 = sample(likert_levels, 150, replace = TRUE, prob = c(1, 0, 1, 1, 0))
  ) |>
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ factor(.x, levels = likert_levels)))

gglikert(df)
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-10-1.png)

## Connect bars

``` r
ggplot(diamonds) +
  aes(x = clarity, fill = cut) +
  geom_bar(width = .5) +
  geom_bar_connector(width = .5, linewidth = .25) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-11-1.png)

## Generate a cascade plot

``` r
diamonds |>
  ggcascade(
    all = TRUE,
    big = carat > .5,
    "big & ideal" = carat > .5 & cut == "Ideal"
  )
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-12-1.png)

# Package index

## Plotting model coefficients

- [`ggcoef_model()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/ggcoef_model.md)
  [`ggcoef_table()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/ggcoef_model.md)
  [`ggcoef_dodged()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/ggcoef_model.md)
  [`ggcoef_faceted()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/ggcoef_model.md)
  [`ggcoef_compare()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/ggcoef_model.md)
  [`ggcoef_plot()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/ggcoef_model.md)
  : Plot model coefficients

## Plotting Likert-type items

- [`gglikert()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/gglikert.md)
  [`gglikert_data()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/gglikert.md)
  [`gglikert_stacked()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/gglikert.md)
  [`gglikert_side()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/gglikert.md)
  : Plotting Likert-type items

## Cascade plots

- [`ggcascade()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/ggcascade.md)
  [`compute_cascade()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/ggcascade.md)
  [`plot_cascade()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/ggcascade.md)
  **\[experimental\]** : Cascade plot

## Additional statistics for `ggplot2`

- [`stat_cross()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/stat_cross.md)
  : Compute cross-tabulation statistics
- [`stat_prop()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/stat_prop.md)
  : Compute proportions according to custom denominator
- [`stat_weighted_mean()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/stat_weighted_mean.md)
  : Compute weighted y mean

## Additional geometries for `ggplot2`

- [`geom_connector()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/geom_connector.md)
  [`geom_bar_connector()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/geom_connector.md)
  : Connect bars / points
- [`geom_stripped_rows()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/geom_stripped_rows.md)
  [`geom_stripped_cols()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/geom_stripped_rows.md)
  : Alternating Background Color

## Convenient geometries / layers

- [`geom_prop_bar()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/geom_prop_bar.md)
  [`geom_prop_text()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/geom_prop_bar.md)
  [`geom_prop_connector()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/geom_prop_bar.md)
  : Convenient geometries for proportion bar plots
- [`geom_diverging()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/geom_diverging.md)
  [`geom_likert()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/geom_diverging.md)
  [`geom_pyramid()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/geom_diverging.md)
  [`geom_diverging_text()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/geom_diverging.md)
  [`geom_likert_text()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/geom_diverging.md)
  [`geom_pyramid_text()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/geom_diverging.md)
  : Geometries for diverging bar plots

## Additional positions for `ggplot2`

- [`position_likert()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/position_likert.md)
  [`position_diverging()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/position_likert.md)
  : Stack objects on top of each another and center them around 0

## Additional scales for `ggplot2`

- [`pal_extender()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/pal_extender.md)
  [`scale_fill_extended()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/pal_extender.md)
  [`scale_colour_extended()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/pal_extender.md)
  : Extend a discrete colour palette
- [`scale_fill_likert()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/scale_fill_likert.md)
  [`likert_pal()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/scale_fill_likert.md)
  : Colour scale for Likert-type plots

## Utilities

- [`ggsurvey()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/ggsurvey.md)
  : Easy ggplot2 with survey objects
- [`symmetric_limits()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/symmetric_limits.md)
  : Symmetric limits
- [`signif_stars()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/signif_stars.md)
  : Significance Stars
- [`augment_chisq_add_phi()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/augment_chisq_add_phi.md)
  : Augment a chi-squared test and compute phi coefficients
- [`label_number_abs()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/label_number_abs.md)
  [`label_percent_abs()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/label_number_abs.md)
  : Label absolute values
- [`weighted.median()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/weighted.median.md)
  [`weighted.quantile()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/weighted.median.md)
  : Weighted Median and Quantiles
- [`weighted.sum()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/weighted.sum.md)
  : Weighted Sum
- [`round_any()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/round_any.md)
  : Round to multiple of any number.
- [`hex_bw()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/hex_bw.md)
  [`hex_bw_threshold()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/hex_bw.md)
  [`auto_contrast`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/hex_bw.md)
  : Identify a suitable font color (black or white) given a background
  HEX color
- [`pal_extender()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/pal_extender.md)
  [`scale_fill_extended()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/pal_extender.md)
  [`scale_colour_extended()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/pal_extender.md)
  : Extend a discrete colour palette

## Deprecated

- [`ggcoef_multicomponents()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/ggcoef_multicomponents.md)
  [`ggcoef_multinom()`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/reference/ggcoef_multicomponents.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** : Deprecated functions

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Geometries for diverging bar
  plots](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/articles/geom_diverging.md):
- [Plot model coefficients with
  \`ggcoef_model()\`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/articles/ggcoef_model.md):
- [Plot Likert-type items with
  \`gglikert()\`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/articles/gglikert.md):
- [Compute cross-tabulation statistics with
  \`stat_cross()\`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/articles/stat_cross.md):
- [Compute custom proportions with
  \`stat_prop()\`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/articles/stat_prop.md):
- [Compute weighted mean with
  \`stat_weighted_mean()\`](https://larmarange.github.io/ggstats/dev/articles/stat_weighted_mean.md):
